# Kazuya Hibara - AI Marketing Engineer

> AI Marketing Engineer who automates business workflows for solo business owners using n8n and AI. Based in Japan, serving clients globally. Bilingual site (EN/JA).

## Site Info

- URL: https://kazuyahibara.com
- Languages: English (/en), Japanese (/ja)
- Owner: Kazuya Hibara
- Role: AI Marketing Engineer / Marketing Operations Specialist
- Specialization: n8n workflow automation, AI-powered marketing systems for solopreneurs and small businesses

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://kazuyahibara.com): Overview of services — "Break Through the Limits with Systems." Implements winning business patterns into 24/7 marketing automation systems.
- [About](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/about): Background, philosophy, and approach. Marketer who understands engineering; engineer who understands the field. Designs systems with "margin" for strategy refinement.
- [What I Do](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/what-i-do): Three solution categories — Front-Office Automation, Back-Office Automation, and Fulfillment & CRM Automation. Includes FAQ.
- [Cases](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases): Real client case studies with before/after metrics.
- [Workflows](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases): Detailed workflow articles showing 12 automation solutions with architecture, tech stack, and results.
- [Contact](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/contact): Consultation booking (30-minute automation assessment).

## Core Expertise

- n8n workflow automation (open-source, self-hosted)
- AI/LLM integration (OpenAI GPT-4o, GPT-4o Vision)
- Marketing automation for solo business owners (solopreneurs)
- Multi-channel communication (LINE, Gmail, web forms)
- CRM automation without expensive tools (Google Sheets as CRM)
- SEO content automation (WordPress auto-publishing)
- Invoice processing and collection automation
- Competitor intelligence monitoring
- Social media content generation (multi-platform)

## Solution Categories

### Category A: Front-Office Automation (Inquiry & Lead Gen)
AI-powered inquiry handling, lead generation, and content creation.

### Category B: Back-Office Automation (Admin Ops)
Invoice processing, collection, reporting, and competitive intelligence.

### Category C: Fulfillment & CRM Automation (Customer Success)
Order sync, customer segmentation, appointment management, and business diagnostics.

## Workflow Solutions

- [AI Multi-Platform Social Media Content Generator](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases/ai-sns-content-generator): Generate platform-optimized posts for Twitter, Instagram, and LinkedIn from a single topic. Reduces content creation from 2h/day to 15 min.
- [SEO-Optimized WordPress Blog Auto-Publisher](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases/seo-wordpress-auto-publisher): Auto-generate SEO blog drafts from Search Console keyword opportunities. Increased output from 0 to 4 articles/month, +180% organic traffic.
- [Google Maps Geographic Business Lead Scraper](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases/google-maps-lead-scraper): Collect business leads by area and industry from Google Maps. Generates 100-500 qualified leads/month at near-zero cost.
- [AI Inquiry Concierge (Multi-Channel)](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases/ai-inquiry-concierge): AI handles initial responses across LINE, email, and web forms. Reduces response time from 24h to 5 min.
- [AI Invoice Collection & Escalation System](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases/ai-invoice-collection): Automated overdue invoice follow-ups with AI-drafted escalating reminders. Collection rate improved from 78% to 95%.
- [Automated Invoice PDF Processing & Data Entry](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases/invoice-pdf-processor): AI Vision extracts data from PDF invoices and auto-populates bookkeeping sheets. Processing time from 5-10 min to 30 sec per document.
- [AI Timesheet & Work Report Generator](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases/ai-timesheet-generator): Auto-generate monthly work reports from calendar and task data. Report creation from 8h to 30 min.
- [Competitor Intelligence Auto-Tracker](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases/competitor-intelligence-tracker): Monitor competitor websites, social media, and pricing with AI-summarized weekly reports.
- [Shopify Order-to-Sheet Sync & Customer Tagging](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases/shopify-order-sync-crm): Real-time order sync with automatic customer segmentation. No expensive CRM needed.
- [AI Calendar Concierge & Smart Notifications](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases/ai-calendar-concierge): Personalized appointment reminders and preparation notes. Reduces no-show rate by 60%.
- [AI Daily Business Summary](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases/daily-business-summary): Morning briefing aggregating orders, inquiries, traffic, and social engagement. Morning startup from 60 min to 5 min.
- [Business Automation Opportunity Analyzer](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases/business-automation-analyzer): Four AI agents analyze your business processes and propose an automation roadmap with ROI projections.

## Case Studies

- [Organic E-Commerce Brand (Sato Wellness)](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases/sato-wellness-shop): SNS time 2h/day to 15 min, repeat rate 22% to 38%, organic traffic +180%, +2.4M yen/year revenue.
- [Solo Tax Accountant (Tanaka Tax Office)](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases/tanaka-tax-office): 60h/month saved, invoice collection 78% to 95%, capacity for 12 new clients, +6M yen/year revenue.
- [Solo Consultant (Yamamoto Consulting)](https://kazuyahibara.com/en/cases/yamamoto-consulting): New leads 0 to 8-12/month, payment collection fully automated, +5M yen/year revenue.

## Tech Stack

- n8n (workflow automation platform)
- OpenAI GPT-4o / GPT-4o Vision
- Google Workspace (Sheets, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Gmail)
- Shopify API
- WordPress REST API
- Google Search Console / Google Analytics
- LINE Official Account API
- Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn APIs
- Slack / Chatwork
- Airtable
- Stripe
